mapper.select: select id, user_id, layout_json, update_time from crm_workbench_layout where user_id = #{userId}
mapper.insert:
select seq_crm_workbench_layout.nextval as id from DUAL
insert into crm_workbench_layout (id, user_id, layout_json, update_time) values (#{id}, #{userId}, #{layoutJson}, sysdate)
mapper.update: update crm_workbench_layout set layout_json = #{layoutJson}, update_time = sysdate where user_id = #{userId}
mapper.select: select i.id as "instanceId", i.business_id as "businessId", i.business_no as "businessNo", c.contract_name as "contractName", n.node_name as "nodeName", i.start_time as "startTime" from crm_workflow_node n inner join crm_workflow_instance i on n.instance_id = i.id left join crm_contract c on i.business_id = c.id where n.approver_id = #{userId} and n.status = '0' and i.status = '0' and i.current_node_id = n.id order by i.start_time desc
select count(1) from crm_customer where create_by = #{createBy}

select s.stage_name as "name", count(1) as "value" from crm_opportunity o inner join crm_opportunity_stage s on o.stage_id = s.id where o.create_by = #{createBy} group by s.stage_name, s.sort_order order by s.sort_order
